cards.subtitle: Mark + wordmark. Light version for the green header. ⚠ placeholder — replace with licensed logo.
cards.name: Logo lockups

cards.subtitle: One global identity + a light per-seller accent. Skeleton never changes.
cards.name: Per-tenant theming

cards.subtitle: Leading colour + success. 600/700 are the originals from the codebase.
cards.name: Brand green

cards.subtitle: HSL-channel tokens consumed via hsl(var(--token)). The Tailwind/shadcn contract.
cards.name: shadcn semantic roles

cards.subtitle: Success = green, warning = soft amber (low stock), error = muted brick.
cards.name: Semantic states

cards.subtitle: Warm neutral ramp — paper, cards, borders, ink. Never pure grey.
cards.name: Stone neutrals

cards.subtitle: The CTA colour — Kup / Dodaj do koszyka. Warm, earthy, never neon.
cards.name: Terracotta accent

cards.subtitle: Primary green, terracotta CTA, secondary, ghost, danger, link · sizes · disabled
cards.name: Buttons

cards.subtitle: Editorial typographic tiles · warm category tints · seller line · circular CTA
cards.name: Product cards

cards.subtitle: Order-status badges, stock pills, and tonal inline alerts
cards.name: Badges & alerts

cards.subtitle: Field (text) with hint & error states · Select with chevron
cards.name: Form fields

cards.subtitle: Sticky green header — global mark + seller name, account & cart
cards.name: Shop header

cards.subtitle: Katalog → koszyk → checkout gotówkowy → moje zamówienia → logowanie
cards.name: Sklep sąsiada — pełny przepływ

cards.subtitle: Soft, warm-tinted shadows. Cards rest on paper, never float in a void.
cards.name: Elevation

cards.subtitle: Soft, friendly corners — a wooden table, not sharp material design.
cards.name: Radius

cards.subtitle: 4px base grid. Named steps; avoid magic px values.
cards.name: Spacing scale

cards.subtitle: Body, UI and labels. Clean, highly legible grotesk.
cards.name: Body — Hanken Grotesk

cards.subtitle: Headings. Humanist grotesk with a hand-cut, neighbourly character.
cards.name: Display — Bricolage Grotesque

cards.subtitle: Tabular lining numerals, heavy weight, high contrast. PLN, comma decimal.
cards.name: Prices

cards.subtitle: Modular ~1.2 ramp, rem-based. Mobile-first floor at 14px for UI.
cards.name: Type scale

templates.name: Strona sklepu sąsiada
templates.description: Katalog mini-sklepu sprzedawcy: zielony header, intro z minimalnym zamówieniem i siatka kart produktów z akcentem per-tenant.

_mirrorNote: Snapshot mirror. The full upstream manifest also embeds a `tokens[]` array (every CSS var with its value, kind, definedIn and scope for :root/.dark/[data-tenant]); those values are authoritative in tokens/*.css and are omitted here to avoid drift. NOTE: upstream captured motion.css durations as 0ms (prefers-reduced-motion); the real defaults live in tokens/motion.css.
